records.name: Open Source Foundation Posture
records.description: Captures the public VeritySpec posture for portfolio validation planning without asserting commercial, marketplace, legal, or privacy approval.
constraints: do not claim external marketplace or platform approval from portfolio records

records.name: Portfolio GitHub Native Planning
records.description: Uses GitHub Issues, Projects, Milestones, Actions, and pull requests for workflow while VeritySpec records hold portfolio truth.
records.issuePolicy: Issues track portfolio validation gaps, fixture updates, report design questions, and evidence requests.
records.projectPolicy: GitHub Projects may show portfolio execution state, but VeritySpec records remain the product-contract source of truth.
records.milestonePolicy: Milestones bound sprint and release work for portfolio validation foundations.

records.name: Portfolio Validation Boundary
records.description: Records the decision that portfolio validation should orchestrate normal workspace checks before adding aggregate report or dependency resolver behavior.
records.decision: Portfolio validation foundations describe workspace inventory, readiness posture, evidence posture, and impact warnings while single-workspace validation remains authoritative.
records.rationale: This prevents a premature second validation model and keeps future aggregate reports grounded in existing VeritySpec issue codes.

records.name: Portfolio Foundation Readiness
records.description: Defines readiness inputs for a portfolio validation foundation before a portfolio CLI command exists.

records.name: Workspace Matrix Evidence
records.description: Requires a deterministic workspace matrix before a portfolio report implementation is treated as ready.

records.name: Portfolio Graph Evidence
records.description: Requires graph evidence for local portfolio or integration fixtures before cross-workspace impact reports are claimed.
